---
title: "Past Projects"
---

> **This page is a placeholder.** A gallery of PTI applications built for
> World Bank projects will be added here.

## Overview

The Project Targeting Index (PTI) framework has been applied in a number of
World Bank analytical and operational projects. Each entry below (once
completed) will include a brief description of the context, the indicators
used, the administrative levels covered, and a link to the live application
where available.

---

## Ukraine

*(Placeholder — description of the Ukraine PTI dashboard, context, indicators,
and links.)*

---

## Project Template

*(Placeholder — additional past project entries will appear here.)*
